message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should leave on sunday
The train should leave after 12:30 and should depart from london liverpool street
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 8 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the centre and should serve hungarian food
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves modern european food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 16:45 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
